title: Add Webhook option for Automations
excerpt:
Is there anyway you could add “run a webhook” option as an action to Automations?  This would allow all sorts of triggers to be put in Monday and allow way more powerful integrations with other systems… 
… example… WHEN …

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there anyway you could add “run a webhook” option as an action to Automations? This would allow all sorts of triggers to be put in Monday and allow way more powerful integrations with other systems…

… example… WHEN DATE ARRIVES and DROPDOWN IS X or Y and GROUP IS something THEN call webhook!

We have so many use cases where this would be really useful !

posts.author: ahiad (ahiad)
posts.cookedHtml:
there is no solution yet right?

this is a very helpful feature to add!

posts.author: sanmart (sanmart)
posts.cookedHtml: Great suggestion — this would be extremely powerful. A “Run a webhook” automation action would unlock far more advanced workflows by letting monday act as a true trigger hub, not just a destination for integrations. Your example (date-based + conditional logic → webhook) highlights a real gap, especially for teams connecting monday to custom systems or internal APIs. Right now, webhooks are limited to board events and can’t be combined with automation logic, which forces workarounds or external middleware.
